creator: david@inty.net
text:
Kernel panics when writing to the floppy disk if the disk is 
write-protected

message is:  panic: vinvalbuf: dirty bufs

How-To-Repeat: Boot machine
Log in as root
Insert formatted, write protected 1.44MB disk into drive.
Type: echo test >/dev/fd0
Warning messages are then printed on the screen, followed by kernel panic
